title: ASTARON Number 1 Balloon 40 Inch Number Balloons for Birthday Party Decorations， Blue 1st Birthday Balloons with Crown for Boys Birthday Decor Anniversary Decorations
features: What You Will Get -- 1 pieces of 40"/100cm long blue color number 1 balloon with gold crown.
Jumbo Size -- These balloons are 100cm/40" in length, very conspicuous balloon decoration, will impress your guests with your party.
Foil Construction -- Made of durable aluminized plastic film, blue balloon number 1, and it is fully automatic sealing, not easy to break and keep gas for longer.

Anniversary And Birthday Decorations - Pastel blue color number balloon for boy's birthday, the gold crown and number balloons combination, with the luxurious and elegant feeling, are amazing photo props for birthday party, anniversary celebrations indoor or outdoor.

Easy To Use -- Can be filled with air or helium. In order to prevent the balloon from bursting, it is recommended to fill it with 90% gas.And, you can insert a straw into the inflation port to deflate and save it for next use.
description: Product Description High Quality and Unique Design 0-9 NUMBER BALLOONS 1.This balloon is large enough. The length of each number balloon is about 40 inches. 2.Made of aluminum-coated film material, it has good sealing performance and can hold air for a longer period of time. 3. The crown and balloon are connected together, there is no need to assemble them, easy to use. 4. There are numbers 0-9, used individually or in combination, suitable for birthday parties of all ages, and can also be used as decoration for anniversary celebrations.
